description:
Design an elevated solar canopy over a municipal aqueduct. SketchUp Make 2017 is open with a 50m long trapezoidal concrete canal already modeled. Your task:
1. Construct a flat rectangular surface (50m x 20m) spanning the open canal.
2. Elevate this surface so it is suspended at least 2.0 meters ABOVE the highest edges of the concrete canal walls (leaving a clear vertical gap for water flow and maintenance).
3. Use the Skelion plugin to populate this elevated canopy with a continuous solar array using Landscape orientation, 180° South Azimuth, and 5° Tilt.
4. Save the completed model as 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\aqueduct_canopy_solar.skp'.
